stellaria.description: Stellaria is quite a cold person and not very expressive...
stellaria.histoire:
Childhood

22 January 1256

Stellaria is the daughter of the Emperor of Painari. She grew up in opulence and wealth and never lacked for anything. Her father was very attached to her and spoiled her enormously to make her forgive her absences. She spent her days surrounded by servants and professors.
She was a curious child, who devoured books and was always thirsty for knowledge. But she had a lot of socialization difficulties and didn't learn to speak until very late. As soon as she learned to read, she began to spend her days in the palace library without ever seeking to go outside in the gardens.
Her view of the world was limited to what she could read and what her masters could teach her.
Painarian Revolution

Stella only knew the story and the life of Painari through the books entrusted to her. Her vision was completely utopian of this country. When she met Ilian she didn’t understand the anger that animated him. For her, every citizen of Painari was happy. He made her discover his life and those of those of the low districts. Although she had little empathy, Stella had a very egalitarian spirit. For her, a good leader had to treat his people well. That day, she decided to confront her father about the misery she had seen. Faced with his lack of reaction, she understood that he was aware of these problems and that he decided to ignore them, even to feed on them. She lost all esteem she had for him and decided to join the revolution in place. She joins Ilian and Mercure among the revolutionaries, and she develops with them the plan to destroy the government of her father. Aged only 13 during the revolution, she was nevertheless one of the key players who allowed the people to regain power. After having faked her death, she had to isolate herself from her hometown and go into exile in the company of Ilian.


Exile

After their departure from Painari, Ilian and Stella wander for many months before meeting Signore Resario, director of the circus L'Atrio. They join his troupe under the stage names of Strega and Lupo. For two years, they travel the roads of Sadi Dünya with the circus. Thanks to Ilian's power and Stella's ingenuity, they set up a spectacle of play of light and reflections in which Ilian seems to duplicate himself and emerge all around the spectators.
These years allowed Stella to discover the world and its challenges. After some disappointment she realizes two things: to do what you want in this world you need money, and that you can control the future and the future by writing history the way you want. wish.

They decide later to take the road again on their own so that Ilian finds his father Mercure. It is at his funeral that Stella and Ilian meet Gyulladt who offers them to work for her as mercenaries. She will entrust them with many missions while keeping a maternal eye on them for Mercure.

Ash War

After several years, Gyulladt realizes the strength of Ilian and the powerful duo they represent. During the destruction of Vehmas, she will entrust them with the mission of finding a mage who can free the hero from his eternal ice and kill him if he repeats the mistakes of the past.
Stella therefore finds Sila, a very powerful water mage. Once the hero was free, the four of them fought at the front to prevent the monsters from invading the territory.
